title: Ascension Mastery
body:
> **"Explore the world like a true adventurer!"**

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join_Us-5865F2?style=flat-square&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/YRb6fsH9)

## 📖 Introduction

**Ascension Mastery** is an RPG mod designed to reinvent the vanilla Minecraft exploration experience. Forget about mindlessly grinding mob farms to get stronger.

We introduce a brand new **"Skill Point"** system that rewards players who truly explore the world. By venturing into unknown biomes, tasting exotic foods, and looting ancient treasures, you earn points to unlock a massive Skill Tree. From **Double Jumping** to summoning **Wolf Packs**, from **Auto-Smelting** to unleashing **Destructive Magic**, every adventure translates into tangible power.

👉 **[View the Wiki for Full Skill & Stat Details](https://github.com/QiShui47/ascension-mastery/wiki/Home-EN)**

---

## 🎮 Core Mechanics

### 1. Exploration is Power
In this mod, **XP ≠ Skill Points**. To ascend, you must step out of your comfort zone:
* **Collector**: Pick up unique items for the first time.
* **New Horizons**: Step into new biomes or dimensions.
* **Gastronome**: Taste foods you have never eaten before.
* **Archaeologist**: Loot chests in structures like Dungeons or Strongholds.
* **Hunt**: Claim "First Kills" on various mobs. Bosses yield massive rewards.
* **Advancement**: Complete vanilla advancements.

### 2. The Skill Tree
Press **`K`** (default) to open the Skill Tree. Mix and match abilities from four main branches:

* **⚔️ Combat**:
    * Master fire magic to ignite enemies or empower yourself with lava.
    * Learn aerial combat arts to deal devastating damage while airborne.
* **🏃 Survival**:
    * Gain high-mobility skills like **Double Jump** and **Charged Super Jump**.
    * Gain buffs and massive health boosts through special dietary habits.
* **⛏️ Excavation**:
    * Significantly boost mining and logging efficiency.
    * Find rare minerals even in common stone.
    * Unlock utilities like **Gold Panning** from sand or a portable **Pocket Furnace**.
* **✨ Arcane**:
    * Gain experience by reading books or master the art of **Teleportation**.

### 3. Active Skills & Controls
The mod offers more than just passive buffs. It features a complete action system:
* **Tactical Switch**: Hold **`Alt`** + **`Scroll Wheel`** to cycle through equipped active skills.
* **Cast Skill**: Hold **`Alt`** + **`Left/Right Click`** to unleash the primary/secondary effects.
* *(All keybinds are customizable in Options)*

---

## ✨ Unique Enchantments

We bring a series of game-changing "Utility Enchantments" to vanilla tools, rather than just simple stat boosts:

* **Summoning**: Arrows can spawn **Iron Golems** to fight for you, or summon tamed **Cats**.
* **Tactical**: Steal movement speed from enemies, or heal yourself on hit (**Life Steal**).
* **Destruction**: The legendary **Death Star Cannon** enchantment can instantly obliterate terrain and enemies.

---

## 🤝 Community & Support

Found a bug? Have a brilliant idea for a new skill? Think a skill is too OP? Or just want to share your build?
Join our community!

* **Discord**: [**Join our Server**](https://discord.gg/YRb6fsH9)
* **Issue Tracker**: [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/QiShui47/ascension-mastery/issues)

---

## 🗺️ Roadmap

Ascension Mastery is constantly evolving. My long-term goals include:
* Expanding the Skill Tree branches and the Active Skill system.
* Overhauling the Enchantment system for more depth.
* Balancing gameplay to encourage exploration without ruining the vanilla feel.
* Adding configuration files to allow players to customize values.
* Redesigning the Skill Tree UI for better visuals and interaction.
* Porting to newer Minecraft versions.

---
*Created by QiShui48. Powered by Fabric.*
